task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat login screen or main interface is visible in the browser or application window.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged in using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (bypassing the login screen).

task_completion.description: The direct message channel for 'agent.user' is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chat header clearly displays 'agent.user' as the active conversation, or 'agent.user' is selected in the left sidebar under Direct Messages.

task_completion.description: The exact target message is typed into the chat input box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Please review the 8.0.0 release notes and confirm compatibility with our production environment. Deadline: Friday EOD.' is visible inside the message composition area at the bottom of the chat.

task_completion.description: The target message is successfully sent to 'agent.user'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact target message appears in the main chat history pane as a sent message (typically with a timestamp and the sender's avatar).

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface instead of terminal commands or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web or desktop GUI. No terminal windows executing curl or API scripts are visible.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly Rocket.Chat (showing chat sidebars, headers, and message inputs), not a generic text editor like Notepad or Gedit.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the sent message.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (such as the Elements or Console tabs) are open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Recipient: 'agent.user'. Target Message: 'Please review the 8.0.0 release notes and confirm compatibility with our production environment. Deadline: Friday EOD.'
